title: Design a ride sharing app like uber or lyft
overview: Design a scalable ride-sharing platform where riders can discover nearby drivers and request rides, handling 10 million daily trips with real-time location tracking and efficient driver-rider matching.

levels.title: Basic Design
levels.constraints: Support 10M daily rides with real-time driver location updates every 3-5 seconds and match riders to nearby drivers within 5 seconds.
levels.feedbackHint: Great job nailing the core architecture! Now think about how your system handles massive scale — what happens when millions of users are requesting rides simultaneously?
levels.aiContextHint: This level tests whether the student understands the basic components of a ride-sharing app: a way for drivers to send location updates, a matching service to connect riders with nearby drivers, persistent storage for ride/user data, and a basic caching layer for frequently accessed location data. Accept any reasonable architecture that includes real-time location ingestion, a matching/dispatch component, some form of database for rides and users, and a cache. Do not require perfect component names — focus on whether the functional roles are covered.
